$comment: Kiro CLI v2 companion to the v3 suite. Merge the 'hooks' block into your v2 agent config (e.g. ~/.kiro/agents/default.json) — v2 has no standalone hooks files. camelCase triggers are the v2 convention; guards.py is shared with v3 unchanged. Run `kiro-cli agent migrate` later to confirm v3 equivalence.

agentSpawn.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo "## Git context"; git status -sb; echo; echo "Recent commits:"; git log --oneline -5; } || true

postToolUse.command: P=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.path // empty'); case "$P" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$P" >/dev/null 2>&1;; *.py) ruff format "$P" 2>/dev/null || black -q "$P" 2>/dev/null;; *.tf|*.tfvars) command -v tofu >/dev/null 2>&1 && tofu fmt "$P" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; exit 0

stop.command: command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e 'display notification "Session ended" with title "Kiro v2" sound name "Glass"' >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
